sections.core: Vendor fees already cover these core operations, but sponsoring them unlocks stories for social media posting.
sections.registry: Sponsor-funded features beyond the vendor baseline — lantern procession, kids programming, lighting, and more. Vendor fees already fund core ops; pick any story you want to own.
sections.tiers: Recognition levels based on your total sponsorship. Tier benefits stack with any registry stories you fund — your build highlights the tier you reach.
sections.options: Sponsor perks — sponsor booth spot unlocks at Gold ($2,500+). Tent rental requires sponsor booth spot.
